title: Regional Forum Mumbai: IC3 Event Details for Future Applicants
text: Regional forum in Mumbai Event Status: Completed Date: April 26, 2025 Location: Nahar International School, GM Colony, Yadav Nagar, Chandivali, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072, India Recommended for: Potential applicants Book now The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school. At the heart of the forums lies the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future. Nahar International School, GM Colony, Yadav Nagar, Chandivali, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: The Regional Forum in Mumbai, held at Nahar International School on April 26, 2025, was an IC3 event focused on providing counseling to potential university applicants.
